archetype: Pastel & Soft Boutique (Warm Cream & Earthy Accents)
vibe: Ultra premium, modern, playful joyful warmth, Apple-level polish meets boutique toy shop wonder.

headings.styling: Never center by default; use large, expressive sizing (text-4xl to text-6xl+ for heroes).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. p-8, p-12, p-16, py-24.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-3xl for main containers/images. rounded-full for buttons and pills. Apple-style soft corners.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid Protocol. Asymmetrical layouts for marketing sections, strict grid for product listings.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align headings and text for editorial feel. Optical alignment for icons.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C85A4F] text-[#F9F6F0] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#B34A40] transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E1A140] text-[#2C4C3B] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-[#C98B30] transition-colors
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#1DA851] shadow-lg flex items-center gap-2

components.cards_products: Cardless approach. bg-transparent. Large image with rounded-3xl. Text below image. Hover: image scale-up slightly. Use 'group' for hover effects.
components.header: Sticky, glassmorphism on scroll (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80), crisp 1px border-b border-[#EADECF].
components.footer: Massive space (py-24), dark background (#2C4C3B) with cream text (#F9F6F0). Large display text for the brand name.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI customized: rounded-xl, border-[#EADECF], focus:ring-[#C85A4F], bg-white/50

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images scale up 105% softly. Buttons shift -translate-y-0.5 and increase shadow.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use Framer Motion for smooth entrances.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling if possible. Sticky elements for dynamic feel.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Use .js instead of .tsx for React components.
Implement a fully functional e-commerce flow (Single Vendor): Admin, Products, Orders, Cart, Wishlist, WhatsApp Contact.
Ensure the hero section uses the provided hero_banner image creatively - perhaps a split layout with large editorial typography on the left.
Product lists must use the media.products URLs provided. NEVER use placeholder text or dummy image URLs.
Global layout: Provide a floating WhatsApp button fixed at the bottom right at all times.
Contact logic: All inquiries/checkout should direct the user to WhatsApp with a pre-filled message using numbers +91 6375361590, +91 8824837553.
Color application: NEVER use black (#000000) for text. Use the provided text_heading (#2C4C3B) and text_body (#4A5D53).
Enforce data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
